newsSince: No material new fundamental disclosure since June 9; the +11.7% (near limit-up) move is flow on top of +373% YTD. Hollow-core anti-resonant fiber (batch-delivery ready, ~33% lower latency) and the first hollow-core DCI/financial-line bid wins are 2025/early-2026 catalysts already widely discovered, reinforced by MWC 2026 visibility.

sources.label: futunn - Hengtong hollow-core fiber batch delivery
EIN/APOFC - MWC 2026 China hollow-core & AI infra

verdicts.rankRationale: Alpha-residual master list penalizes post-rerating chase: a flow-driven ~limit-up (+11.7%) on +373% YTD with zero new fundamental disclosure since June 9 strips residual alpha. Hollow-core/DCI catalysts are already-discovered mid-2025/early-2026 news. Continue prior down; fundamentals flat (-1).
verdicts.bull: Hollow-core leadership + first DCI bid wins; AI/6G/deep-sea strategic focus.
verdicts.neutral: Catalysts real but fully discovered by a 10B+ CNY/day crowd.
verdicts.bear: +373% YTD flow-driven; no fresh disclosure; A-share momentum reversal risk.
